reference: I have had very bad wrist pain for a long time now. It has gotten to the point where picking up a blanket causes too much pain. It is not swollen or bruised, but it has now become very weak, and when I bend my wrist back, it causes a lot of pain in my whole forearm. Also, when I push on certain spots on my forearm, it causes pain in my wrist. Any idea what could be wrong?
text: i have had very bad wrist pain for a long time it has gotten to the point where picking up a blanket causes too much pain it is not swollen or bruised but it has now become very weak and when i bend my wrist back it causes a lot of pain in my whole forearm also when on certain spots on my forearm it causes pain in my wrist any idea what could be wrong
